not_started.meaning: A local lead/card object exists before image generation has started.

generating.meaning: The card request has been accepted and avatar generation is in progress.
generating.currentUsage: Set while constructing the backend record before generation finishes.

completed.meaning: Bedrock returned a generated avatar image and the card is ready.
completed.currentUsage: Set when Bedrock image generation succeeds.

fallback_used.meaning: The card is complete and printable, but the final card image uses the normalized uploaded photo because Bedrock was not configured or generation failed.
fallback_used.currentUsage: Set when BEDROCK_IMAGE_MODEL_ID is blank or Bedrock invocation fails.

failed.currentUsage: Reserved for a hard failure path where no fallback card can be returned.

not_printed.meaning: No staff print action has been recorded.

printed.meaning: Staff marked the card as printed at the booth.

email_pending.meaning: A confirmation email is queued or expected.

email_failed.meaning: Confirmation email delivery failed or was not accepted by the provider.

operatorRule: completed and fallback_used are both printable. failed is not printable. Do not treat fallback_used as a failed run.
